prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 47.9 kg; Height 157.1 cm; BMI 19.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/60 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.3%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 289mg/dL; 9 months ago 269mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 178mg/dL; current 146mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 49.1kg; 9 months ago 47.7kg; 6 months ago 43.7kg; 3 months ago 46.2kg; current 47.9kg), Height (12 months ago 157.1cm; 9 months ago 157.1cm; 6 months ago 157.1cm; 3 months ago 157.1cm; current 157.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 62mmHg; 9 months ago 63mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 61mmHg; current 60mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 71U/L; 9 months ago 61U/L; 6 months ago 60U/L; 3 months ago 54U/L; current 70U/L), AST (12 months ago 93U/L; 9 months ago 82U/L; 6 months ago 79U/L; 3 months ago 80U/L; current 94U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 26mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 399mg/g; 9 months ago 567mg/g; 6 months ago 626mg/g; 3 months ago 679mg/g; current 397mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 101mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 100mg/dL; 3 months ago 103mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 128mg/dL; 9 months ago 125mg/dL; 6 months ago 108mg/dL; 3 months ago 113mg/dL; current 119mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.32 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
